books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Ernest Hemingway
books.summary: A collection of Ernest Hemingway’s short stories and novellas.

books.title: When God Laughs
books.author: Jack London
books.summary: The eleventh collection of short stories by Jack London.

books.title: A Daughter of the Samurai
books.author: Etsu Inagaki Sugimoto
books.summary: The autobiography of Etsu Sugimoto, a girl born into a samurai family in a time of great cultural changes.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: The Secret of the Old Clock
books.author: Carolyn Keene
books.summary: The sixteen-year-old daughter of a prominent attorney undertakes an investigation to search for a missing will.

books.title: A Prefect’s Uncle
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A boy’s life at boarding school is disrupted by an uncle that he’s never met before.

books.title: The Apple Cart
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: An English king challenges his popular prime minister and cabinet.

books.title: The Warlord of Mars
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: John Carter, an Earth-man transported to Mars, must rescue his beloved princess from imprisonment in the Martian Temple of the Sun.

books.title: Memoirs of a Foxhunting Man
books.author: Siegfried Sassoon
books.summary: A young boy comes of age in the idyllic English countryside just before the Great War tears Europe apart.

books.title: Ghost Stories
books.author: E. F. Benson
books.summary: A collection of ghost stories by E. F. Benson.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: The Shore Road Mystery
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.summary: Two amateur slueths endeavor to break up a carjacking ring.

books.title: The Souls of Black Folk
books.author: W. E. B. Du Bois
books.summary: A seminal collection of essays on the African-American experience.

books.title: Dialogues
books.author: Plato
books.summary: A collection of Plato’s dialogues.

books.title: Magnolia Leaves
books.author: Mary Weston Fordham
books.summary: A collection of poems by Mary Weston Fordham.

books.title: Point Counter Point
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: Several connected stories are interwoven to create a satirical look at English society.

books.title: Stand by for Mars!
books.author: Carey Rockwell
books.summary: Young Tom Corbett finally realizes his dream of becoming a Space Cadet but soon he and his classmates find themselves fighting to stay alive in the harsh Martian desert.

books.title: The Confessions of Arsène Lupin
books.author: Maurice Leblanc
books.summary: The gentleman-thief relates stories of his outwitting the Parisian detectives.

books.title: Unspoken Sermons
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: George MacDonald presents a set of interlocking sermons designed to shape the perception and life of the Christian disciple.

books.title: Through the Brazilian Wilderness
books.author: Theodore Roosevelt
books.summary: Theodore Roosevelt’s autobiographical account of his expedition into the uncharted depths of the Brazilian rainforest.
